testcase.name: API Integration (Express Layer) > GET /ping should return 200 pong
API Integration (Express Layer) > GET /health should return 200 with status ok
API Integration (Express Layer) > GET /non-existent-route should return 404
KeyChanger API Integration > POST /api/key-changer/detect should return 400 if no file
KeyChanger API Integration > GET /api/key-changer/detect-processed/:filename should return 404 if not found
KeyChanger API Integration > POST /api/key-changer/convert should return 400 if no file
KeyChanger API Integration > GET /api/key-changer/download/:filename should return 404 if not found
Remix API Integration > POST /api/remix/register-engine should return 400 for missing data
testcase.system-err: [Engine] Registration failed: Missing url or session_id

testcase.name: Remix API Integration > GET /api/remix/engine-status should return error if no session_id
Remix API Integration > POST /api/remix/process should return 400 if no engine registered
testcase.system-out:
[18:44:24] [f6d7209d] POST /api/remix/process
[Process] Request received: engine=undefined stems=undefined session_id=unknown [Process] Engine lookup: session_id=unknown -> url=undefined
testcase.system-err: [Process] Failed: No engine mapped for session unknown

testcase.name: Remix API Integration > GET /api/remix/history should return history (empty initially)
testcase.system-out: [18:44:25] [99547c13] GET /api/remix/history [MockDB] Executing: SELECT * FROM remix_history ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 15...

testcase.name: Video API Integration > GET /ping should return pong
Video API Integration > GET /health should return 200 ok
Video API Integration > GET /info should return 400 for missing URL
Video API Integration > GET /info should return metadata for valid YouTube URL (Mocked via MSW)

[18:44:05] [c3afbeb0] GET /info?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DnTbA7qrEsP0

[Info] Resolved URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nTbA7qrEsP0
[Info] Progress: fetching_info Metadata parsed
[Metadata] Early hit: "THIS IS 4K ANIME | YOUR NAME 2160P 60FPS" by "ash360ae" [Info] Progress: extracting Metadata found

testcase.name: Video API Integration > GET /info should return metadata for valid Spotify URL (Mocked via MSW)

testcase.name: Video API Integration > POST /telemetry should return 204
testcase.system-out:
[18:44:25] [cb219937] POST /telemetry
[6:44:25 PM] [EME] Client-Side Handshake: test
[MetadataUtil] Stealth fetch failed for https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nTbA7qrEsP0: read EINVAL
[Response] Sending Preview: https://p.scdn.co/mp3-preview/mocked...

testcase.name: Video API Integration > GET /proxy should return 400 for missing url
Video API Integration > GET /stream-urls should return 400 for missing url
Video API Integration > POST /convert should return 400 for missing url
testcase.system-out:
[18:44:26] [0de34101] POST /convert
[Convert] Request received for: undefined (ID: undefined)

testcase.name: Media Contract Hardening > FormatSchema > should validate a valid format
Media Contract Hardening > FormatSchema > should fail on invalid URL
Media Contract Hardening > SpotifyMetadataSchema > should validate valid spotify metadata
Media Contract Hardening > SpotifyMetadataSchema > should fail if artist is missing
Media Contract Hardening > VideoInfoSchema > should validate valid video info
Media Contract Hardening > FinalResponseSchema > should validate a complete final response
Media Contract Hardening > FinalResponseSchema > should handle data URIs for images
Media Contract Hardening > FinalResponseSchema > should fail on missing required fields
Conversion Engine (Automation Proof) > should verify that we can detect a hanging stream
Media FSM > should initialize in idle state
Media FSM > should allow valid transitions
Media FSM > should execute action on transition
Media FSM > should not change state on invalid transition
testcase.system-err: [FSM] Error: Invalid transition from idle to processing

testcase.name: URL Normalization (Cache Consistency) > should strip Spotify tracking parameters (si, context)
URL Normalization (Cache Consistency) > should strip Facebook and TikTok tracking parameters
URL Normalization (Cache Consistency) > should handle URLs without parameters gracefully
streamDownload FFmpeg arguments > should include -bsf:a aac_adtstoasc filter when format is mp4 and shouldCopy is true
testcase.system-out: [Download] [global] Engine: yt-dlp | Platform: Youtube | URL: http://test.com

testcase.name: streamDownload FFmpeg arguments > should include -bsf:a aac_adtstoasc filter when format is mp4 and shouldCopy is false
testcase.system-out: [Download] [global] Engine: yt-dlp | Platform: Youtube | URL: http://test.com

testcase.name: Facebook JS Extractor (Data-Driven) > should extract metadata for 'Facebook Reel'
Facebook JS Extractor (Data-Driven) > should extract metadata for 'Non-existent Video (404)'
Facebook JS Extractor (Data-Driven) > should extract metadata for 'Malformed HTML'
Facebook JS Extractor (Data-Driven) > should be able to initiate a stream (Pure JS Stream)
Facebook Reel JS Extractor > should extract metadata from a Reel URL with mocked HTML
Facebook Reel JS Extractor > should filter out DASH segments and audio-only streams
Facebook Reel JS Extractor > should isolate correct video in preloaded feed and extract split streams
Facebook Reel JS Extractor > should correctly categorize split DASH components
Facebook Reel JS Extractor > should ignore unrelated formats in the same script block
Facebook Stories Extractor > should detect story URLs and extract video metadata from JSON
Facebook Stories Extractor > should fallback gracefully when metadata is missing
Facebook Stories Extractor > should extract photo from an image-only story
Instagram JS Extractor (Data-Driven) > should extract metadata for 'Instagram Reel'
Instagram JS Extractor (Data-Driven) > should be able to initiate a stream (Pure JS Stream)
Spotify Extractor (Mocked) > should parse metadata correctly using mocked data

testcase.name: Facebook Reel JS Extractor (Integration-style) > should extract metadata and streams for a live Reel URL
Metascraper Integration > should fetch metadata for a generic URL
Metascraper Integration > should prioritize metascraper data in social normalization
Metascraper Integration > should fallback to yt-dlp data if metascraper data is missing
Metascraper Integration > should use genericExtractor for unsupported URLs in getInfo
YouTube Extractor Speed & Integrity > should return metadata for a valid YouTube URL
YouTube Extractor Speed & Integrity > should detect high resolutions (4K/1080p) on first hit
Security Protections Verification > Rate Limiting: blocks excessive requests to /info
testcase.system-err: [Test Skip] Server down at http://localhost:5000. Skipping rate limit test.

testcase.name: Security Protections Verification > Concurrency Guard: blocks simultaneous downloads from same IP
testcase.system-err: [Test Skip] Server down at http://localhost:5000. Skipping concurrency test.

testcase.name: Security Protections Verification > Stability: light requests (/ping) should NOT be subject to concurrency guard
SSRF Integration: pipeWebStream > blocks request to 127.0.0.1
SSRF Integration: pipeWebStream > blocks request to localtest.me
SSRF Integration: pipeWebStream > allows request to a public domain (Google)
testcase.system-out:
[Quantum-Undici] Creating new connection pool for: https://[2001:4860:4828:7700::]
[6:44:23 PM] [Quantum-Undici] 206 OK (0.0MB) -> https://www.google.com/robots.txt...

testcase.name: SSRF Protection > should block private IP ranges
SSRF Protection > should allow public IP ranges
